- CVE-2026-23865: Integer overflow in the tt_var_load_item_variation_store function (bsc#1259118).
- CVE-2026-50811: out-of-bounds read vulnerabilityin src/truetype/ttgxvar.c in the TT_Get_Var_Design implementation used by FT_Get_Var_Design_Coordinates (bsc#1271045).
